ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "reid" TEXT /* REID (Real Estate Identifier) for the property */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street address of the property */,
  "zipcode" INTEGER /* Zip code of the property */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the property is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the property is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the property */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the property */,
  "fipscounty" INTEGER /* FIPS county code of the property */,
  "use_code" TEXT /* Use code of the property (e.g., Mobile, SingleFamily) */,
  "tax_assessment_year" INTEGER /* Year the property was last assessed for tax purposes */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "lot_size_sqft" INTEGER /* Lot size of the property in square feet */,
  "finished_sqft" INTEGER /* Finished square footage of the property */,
  "bathrooms" REAL /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "zestimate" REAL /* Zestimate value of the property */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property or neighborhood */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., city, neighborhood) */,
  "construction_status" TEXT /* Current construction status of the property */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the property information was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the property data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_property_type FOREIGN KEY ("property_type") REFERENCES property_types ("property_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_use_code FOREIGN KEY ("use_code") REFERENCES use_codes ("use_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_types" (
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property type */,
  "property_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the property type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "use_codes" (
  "use_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each use code */,
  "use_code_name" TEXT /* Name of the use code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the use code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("use_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax assessment */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being assessed */,
  "assessment_year" INTEGER /* Year of the assessment */,
  "assessed_value" REAL /* Assessed value of the property */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the assessment */,
  "assessment_type" TEXT /* Type of assessment (e.g., Annual, Special) */,
  "assessment_district" TEXT /* Assessment district of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_assessments_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property sale */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Sale price of the property */,
  "buyer_name" TEXT /* Name of the buyer */,
  "seller_name" TEXT /* Name of the seller */,
  "sale_type" TEXT /* Type of sale (e.g., Residential, Commercial) */,
  "sale_status" TEXT /* Status of the sale (e.g., Pending, Closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_sales_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zestimate value */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being valued */,
  "value_date" TEXT /* Date of the zestimate */,
  "zestimate" REAL /* Zestimate value of the property */,
  "valuation_method" TEXT /* Method used to determine the property value (e.g., Assessor's Value, Appraised Value) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_values_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property feature */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_value" TEXT /* Value of the feature */,
  "feature_category" TEXT /* Category of the feature (e.g., Exterior, Interior, Amenities) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_features_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the neighborhood is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the neighborhood is located */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the neighborhood */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_type" TEXT /* Type of neighborhood (e.g., Residential, Commercial) */,
  "school_district" TEXT /* School district of the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neighborhoods_city FOREIGN KEY ("city") REFERENCES cities ("city_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the city */,
  "city_type" TEXT /* Type of city (e.g., Incorporated, Unincorporated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES states ("abbreviation")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the state */,
  "fips_code" TEXT /* FIPS code of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., property manager, real estate agent, data analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property visit */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property visited */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user visiting the property */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "visit_type" TEXT /* Type of visit (e.g., inspection, showing) */,
  "visit_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the visit (e.g., buying, selling) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_visits_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_visits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property image */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the image belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the image in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., photo, document) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_images_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)
